title: avenastrum caryophylleum
intro:
Avenastrum caryophylleum, also known as Wild Chamomile or False Chamomile, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and feathery foliage.

The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Avenastrum caryophylleum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for flexibility in its application and usage.
